name: Green Bean, Potato and Leek Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound green beans, trimmed, halved crosswise
4 leeks, (white part only), halved lengthwise and thinly sliced crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil or steam potatoes and green beans separately until tender but not mushy.
2. Drain or remove from steamer. Cut each potato into eighths.
3. Place the cut potatoes in a salad bowl. Add the green beans.
4. In a small bowl, blend dijon mustard and vinegar. Whisk vegetable oil into the mixture in thin streams.
5. Pour the dressing over the potatoes and beans. Mix gently to coat.
6. Season the salad to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside.
7. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a heavy large skillet over medium heat. Add leeks and saute until tender and lightly browned, about 7 minutes.
8. Divide the potato and green bean mixture among salad plates. Top each with sauteed leeks.
9. Sprinkle salads with chopped fresh parsley. Garnish each salad with 2 quarters of hard-boiled eggs, if desired, and serve.
